texto: Have you read 'The Grapes of Wrath?' That was my family. My dad was a sharecropper in western Oklahoma. When the dust storms came and everything got wiped out, they came to California. The guys with the mattresses on the tops of their cars in the movie? That was the way it was.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de B. Wayne Hughes que provoca temas ligados a familia. Ao questionar “Have you read 'The Grapes of Wrath?' That was my family. My dad was a sharecropper in western Okl…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, family, you, com foco em dia-chuvoso e you.
